simple_types.name: Channel_Number
simple_types.code: type Channel_Number is new Short range 0 .. 65535;

simple_types.name: Field_Value_Type
simple_types.code:
type Field_Value_Type is (
   FV_Boolean,
   FV_Short_Short_Int,
   FV_Short_Short_Uint,
   FV_Short_Int,
   FV_Short_Uint,
   FV_Long_Int,
   FV_Long_Uint,
   FV_Long_Long_Int,
   …,
   FV_Void
);

simple_types.name: Frame_Type
simple_types.code: type Frame_Type is (Method_Frame, Header_Frame, Body_Frame, Heartbeat_Frame);

array_types.name: Field_Array
array_types.code: type Field_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Field_Value_Access;

record_types.name: Field_Table
Field_Table_Entry
Field_Value
Frame_Header
